output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?system ?systemLabel WHERE {
  ?system wdt:P31 wd:Q204204 .
  ?system rdfs:label ?systemLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?systemLabel) = "en")
}
output.answer: The different numeral systems include Roman numerals, Arabic numerals, Babylonian numerals, Mayan numerals, and Chinese numerals. This is based on the Wikidata query which identifies these as instances of the numeral system class (Q204204).
output.formatted:
The different numeral systems include Roman numerals, Arabic numerals, Babylonian numerals, Mayan numerals, and Chinese numerals. This is based on the Wikidata query which identifies these as instances of the numeral system class (Q204204).

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?system ?systemLabel WHERE {
  ?system wdt:P31 wd:Q204204 .
  ?system rdfs:label ?systemLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?systemLabel) = "en")
}
```

args.answer: The different numeral systems include Roman numerals, Arabic numerals, Babylonian numerals, Mayan numerals, and Chinese numerals. This is based on the Wikidata query which identifies these as instances of the numeral system class (Q204204).

question: What were the different numeral systems ?
reference_answer: Proto-cuneiform numerals | Egyptian numerals | Chinese numerals Japanese numerals Korean numerals (Sino-Korean) Vietnamese numerals (Sino-Vietnamese) | Aegean numerals | Bengali numerals | Roman numerals | Hebrew numerals | Greek numerals | Armenian numerals | Khmer numerals | Thai numerals | Abjad numerals | Eastern Arabic numerals | Vietnamese numerals (Chữ Nôm) | Glagolitic numerals | Cyrillic numerals | Burmese numerals | Cistercian numerals | Maya numerals | Muisca numerals | Korean numerals (Hangul) | Sinhala numerals | Pentimal runes | Binary | Ternary | Quaternary | Quinary | Senary | Octal | Decimal / Denary | Duodecimal | Hexadecimal | Vigesimal | Sexagesimal | [[Unary numeral system|Unary]](Bijectivebase1) | Balanced ternary | Quater-imaginary base | Golden ratio base
